TimeEntry.Title: Website
TimeEntry.Notes: Got an email from Christopher regarding the SSL expired email....The user requested an update for their SSL certificate, which was expiration. So login to the Godday account and download the SSL certificate. I accessed the server as root and upload the certificate....navigated to the ssl.conf  edited to update the paths to the new SSL certificate, private key, and chain file. After saving the changes, I restarted the Apache service with the command sudo systemctl restart httpd to apply the new certificate. The new SSL certificate is now valid until December 21, 2026. The certificate was verified using the SSL Labs SSL Test tool, confirming that it has been successfully updated and is working correctly on the server. No further action is required unless the user encounters issues with the updated certificate.

TimeEntry.Title: CLBShedPC : Manually patch update as APD couldn't do
TimeEntry.Notes: Accessed the machine, applied the patches successfully, and will wait for a reboot as background services prevented the changes from reflecting in the database.
TimeEntry.Resource: S. Kumar Sharma CHD-TS1 Support - Remote

TimeEntry.Title: CLBShedPC Missing patch while last run
TimeEntry.Notes:
I worked on the Missing patches and logged into the ManageEngine portal to review the approved patches for the machines. I downloaded and manually installed the applicable failed/missing patches. Rebooted Also scanned the machines. Some patches not applicable due to non compatibility.Rebooted the computer.

Patches are  NVIDIA app (x64) (11.0.6.379)
Google Chrome (x64) (144.0.7559.59,144.0.7559.60)
Update for Microsoft 365 Apps for Enterprise Current Channel for x64 2512 of version(19530.20144)
